text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today, Gold Ship and I are visiting a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Phew... And up! And down! And left! And right!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Dancing's how we communicate with the spirits!
It's been that way since ancient times!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm practically an oracle, so if I dance, the
spirits'll probably get their boogie on too!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So here I am, dancing away! One and two and
three and four and—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's that you say, spirits? "Sleep lots, eat
lots"?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm an expert at that! No time like the present
to put that advice into practice!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: After all, who am I to disobey the spirits?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship follows the spirits' advice to a tee, and
her condition improves quite a bit.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! "Listen to your trainer," you say?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, no, no! The Golshi doesn't take orders from anybody!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: That includes all-powerful spirits! Fare thee well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's because she ignored what the spirits
said, but Gold Ship's condition doesn't improve
at all...
